stemHtml: During an idle thrust descent at a constant indicated airspeed (IAS) in the clean configuration, what will happen if the pilots deploy the speed brakes?

options.a: Both the rate of descent and descent angle will increase, even if the speed is constant.
options.b: The rate of descent will increase, but the angle of descent will only increase if the pilot reduces the speed.
options.c: The rate of descent will increase, but the angle of descent will only increase if the pilot increases the speed.
options.d: The angle of descent will increase, but the rate of descent will also increase, provided the pilot reduces the speed.
